summary: Block 3 testing (press logos + /team SSR). Backend: 11/11 pytest PASS (admin login, /api/admin/press/list returns 5 records with logo{method,url,approved,initials}, none published; /api/admin/press/logo/{extract,approve,initials} work correctly; .webp static logos served as image/webp; /api/seo/team SSR shows tipster cards in order il-marziano, sono-micuccio, il-ninja AND collab-card-sono-gianmarco; /api/seo/home and /api/seo/il-podcast contain the 3 tipster cards and DO NOT contain 'Sono Gianmarco'; /api/seo/parlano-di-noi 200 with empty state). Frontend admin: login OK, Rassegna stampa page loads 5 rows; press-logo-extract-all-btn triggers extraction and shows press-logo-report with 5 rows (methods: metadata, jsonld, fallback iniziali for irraggiungibile / HTTP 403 — atteso); preview pane shows press-logo-block with all required buttons (press-logo-extract-btn, press-logo-manual-btn, press-logo-initials-btn) and press-logo-approve-btn appears conditionally; CRITICAL POSITIVE: approving the logo does NOT publish the mention (status stays 'Da revisionare'). MINOR UI SYNC: after clicking Approva logo / Usa iniziali, the 'Approvato' badge text was not visible inside press-logo-block within 2.5s of refresh — likely a state-propagation timing issue worth investigating.

ui_bugs.issue: After POST /api/admin/press/logo/approve (or /initials) the optimistic UI updates row data, but the 'Approvato' badge inside the currently-open preview's press-logo-block did not appear within 2.5s (backend persistence verified OK). Likely refresh() returns before React commits the new preview state, or the setPreview functional update doesn't find the refreshed item in time.

test_results_detail.backend_pytest: 11/11 PASS in test_block3_press_logos.py (admin login, list, extract, approve, initials, .webp served, SSR /team, /home & /il-podcast hide collab, /parlano-di-noi empty)
test_results_detail.frontend_admin_login: PASS - login OK with credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (Entra button by accessible name)
test_results_detail.press_page_load: PASS - 5 rows render, status counts visible (found=4, review=1, published=0)
test_results_detail.press_logo_extract_all: PASS - press-logo-report shows 5 rows: Cosenzachannel.it/metadata/144x144/ok, Calabria7.news/-/logo_review_required pagina irraggiungibile, Parmalive.com/jsonld/144x144/ok, Forzaparma.it/-/logo_review_required HTTP 403 (fallback iniziali — atteso), Cosenzachannel.it/metadata/144x144/ok
test_results_detail.press_logo_preview_panel: PASS - press-logo-block, press-logo-preview/initials, press-logo-extract-btn, press-logo-manual-btn, press-logo-initials-btn all present; press-logo-approve-btn shown conditionally
test_results_detail.logo_approve_no_autopublish: PASS - mention status stayed 'DA REVISIONARE' after approving logo (no auto-publish)
test_results_detail.logo_approve_ui_badge: FAIL (timing) - 'Approvato' badge not detected in press-logo-block inner_text within 2.5s after click; backend list query confirms approved=true
test_results_detail.usa_iniziali_ui_badge: FAIL (timing) - same as above for press-logo-initials-btn

action_items: Investigate UI refresh in Press.jsx after press-logo-approve-btn / press-logo-initials-btn: ensure setPreview re-renders the press-logo-block with the new logo.approved=true within the same tick (or add a local optimistic update). Backend persistence is OK; this is a frontend state-sync timing issue.
critical_code_review_comments: press_logos.py extract_sync uses synchronous requests.get inside loop.run_in_executor — fine. _validate_and_optimize correctly rejects animated/transparent/banner-shaped images. Min dimension 32 may still let through ugly favicons; review_status logic gates this (only jsonld/metadata/apple-touch with >=64px get 'ok'). Good.

Press.jsx refresh() updates preview functionally but the same refresh is awaited inside async handlers; UI may rely on natural re-render. Consider also setting preview locally with the approve/initials result before refresh() to avoid the timing observed by the testing agent.
approve_logo only updates logo.approved without touching mention status — confirmed: approving logo does NOT publish the mention. Excellent separation of concerns.
/api/static/press_logos/<file>.webp is served correctly with image/webp; LOGO_DIR is created at import. Verify backup/rotation strategy for these files in production (not blocking).

success_rate.frontend: 9/11 = 82% (2 UI-sync timing issues, non-blocking — backend data is correct)

test_credentials: Admin authentication configured and verified. No credentials stored (see backend/.env).
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing 5 press records (Cosenzachannel.it x2, Forzaparma.it, Parmalive.com, Calabria7.news).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 3 functionality is solid. Backend SSR /api/seo/team renders tipster cards in correct order with collab-card-sono-gianmarco only on /team/ (not on /home or /il-podcast). Press logo extraction works for sites that respond (Cosenzachannel via metadata, Parmalive via jsonld) and falls back to initials for irraggiungibile/403 (expected per user). The only nit is a frontend timing issue in Press.jsx: after approve/initials clicks, the 'Approvato' badge inside press-logo-block may not appear within 2.5s — needs a tiny optimistic-update or a wait on the refresh. If you re-run frontend tests, give >5s after click before scanning press-logo-block inner_text. Admin login UI uses the 'Entra' button (no type=submit); use page.get_by_role('button', name='Entra').
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no critical bugs. The two FAILs in the frontend script are timing-related: backend POST /api/admin/press/logo/approve persists approved=true (verified via /api/admin/press/list), but the awaited refresh() inside the React handler does not always propagate to the preview pane within 2.5s in headless browser. Recommended fix: after the await api.pressLogoApprove(id), do a local setPreview(prev => prev && {...prev, logo: {...prev.logo, approved: true, review_status: 'approved'}}) BEFORE refresh().
